title: Sculk Revolution
description: Ancient Evils have broken free in this world, can you stop the Sculk from taking over the world while other beasts attempt to stop you?
body:
## Warning: This Pack DOES have horror aspects to it!
After an unknown event, the ancient evils dorment in this world have broken free. You task is to stop the Sculk, your main threat, from consuming this world. We will send you back in time before the spread begins to give you more time to stop it. But be warned, this also let loose other beasts to stop you.
